name: Little West Holdings Inc.
business: Little West Holdings Inc. sells premium low-sugar, cold-pressed juices made from farm-sourced ingredients using High-Pressure Processing (HPP). It operates a dual-channel strategy: direct-to-consumer via its e-commerce website and wholesale distribution to retailers, corporate clients, and distributors. Its products are available on the West Coast of the United States through partnerships with distributors and retailers such as Whole Foods.

exposures.sentence: We are a holding company specializing in premium low-sugar, cold-pressed juices, crafted with ingredients sourced directly from farms.
We operate through a dual channel strategy. We offer our products on our e-commerce website, www.littlewest.com, where we offer convenient online shopping and direct delivery.

tamClaims.claim: Global cold-pressed juice market projected to grow from USD 1.61 billion in 2025 to USD 2.38 billion by 2030 at CAGR 8.13%
tamClaims.sentence: The global cold-pressed juice market is projected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.13% from 2025 to 2030, expanding from an estimated USD 1.61 billion in 2025 to USD 2.38 billion by 2030 (https://www.mordorintelligence.com/industry-reports/cold-pressed-juice-market)

tamClaims.claim: 100% fruit and vegetable blend segment expected to grow at CAGR 8.8% from 2024 to 2030
tamClaims.sentence: We believe the wellness beverage industry is booming, with the 100% fruit and vegetable blend segment expected to grow at a CAGR of 8.8% from 2024 to 2030. ( source , https://grandviewresearch.com/industry-analysis/100-perecent-juice-market-report).

tamClaims.claim: Private-label food and beverage market size projected to grow $281.15 billion between 2022 and 2027 at CAGR 6.39%
tamClaims.sentence: The private-label food and beverage market size is projected grow $281.15 billion between 2022 and 2027, with a CAGR of 6.39% during that period. ( source , https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/private-label-food-and-beverages-market-size-to-grow-by-usd-281-15-billion-from-2022-to-2027-aldi-stores-ltd-amazoncom-inc-carrefour-sa-and-more-to-emerge-as-key-players--technavio-301875509.html)
